title: Novi Sad Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Novi Sad with a Z-Score of +3.23. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Novi Sad is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 10.3 GG. 
 The low humidity of 20% and gentle wind of 2.5 km/h are exacerbating the situation. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to the prolonged heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of this critical event.
